sections.label: Macro
sections.body: Risk-off deepens with Fear & Greed dropping 9 points into Extreme Fear, the first reading at that level since May 15. Tech equities print all-time highs against crypto sitting in fear. The divergence is the tell on whether the institutional pool bidding HYPE ETFs ($100M cumulative, $19M Bitwise single-day) is the same pool buying Micron, or whether IBIT's seven-day outflow streak is structural repositioning into equities.

sections.label: Perps
sections.body: QUIET across the 25-asset slice with two ACCUMULATION prints alone — ZEC day-2 and 1000PEPE direct from new entrant with the CONFIRMED sub-tag. NEAR bled -11.63% on OI -26.58% but funding still positive at +0.0114%/8h, failing the CAPITULATION gate. The AI-compute leadership bid from yesterday rotated off wholesale: NEAR flipped TRENDING+DOWN after five up-sessions, WLD halved to +8.8% losing both BREAKOUT and TRENDING+UP.

sections.label: Book
sections.body: Closing RENDER on a clean invalidation breach trims AI-compute concentration from four names to three. EIGEN, AKT, TAO carry the sector exposure forward and the named concentration risk fired partially today, not wholesale. SEI opens as a catalyst-dated L1 diversifier with a Q2 stack landing on fixed dates.

market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · trim and diversify. RENDER closes on invalidation, SEI adds catalyst-dated L1 exposure, the rest rides with the sector-rotation risk on tight watch. Risk-off macro keeps sizing conservative.

current_positions.thesis_note: structural smart-money exit intact, risk-off deepening, no narrative tailwind to defend the bid
current_positions.watch: BCH absent from today's data sources for the fifth straight session. The fade in attention itself is the continuation read. Watching for a relief bounce above $355 with volume that would mark a structure break.

current_positions.thesis_note: AI-compute sector concentration risk fired partially today (NEAR -11.63%) but EIGEN held. Invalidation $0.205 still holds with the Nebius acquisition and narrative RIDE pillars intact.
current_positions.watch: EIGEN absent from today's winners and losers. The sector rotation hit NEAR hardest but spared the rest of the pack. Watching for a second day of NEAR-style selling across EIGEN, AKT, RENDER, TAO that would mark a sector-wide unwind.

current_positions.thesis_note: decentralized compute narrative still rides at peak with extension; AKT absent from today's losers list while NEAR took the sector hit
current_positions.watch: The sector concentration risk named on entry activated through NEAR's -11.63% flush. AKT holding while NEAR breaks is the tell. A second session of AKT joining NEAR red means the leadership thesis cracks.

current_positions.thesis_note: Today's perps print at $1.905 closes well below the $2.00 invalidation. AI-compute sector rotation caught the late entry on the wrong side of the unwind.
regime degraded from ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT to NEUTRAL on OI 7d cooling below the +10% gate, but three pillars (Bittensor revenue, narrative RIDE, smart money L/S 2.12 still building) hold
current_positions.watch: The ACCUMULATION print held one calendar day before cooling. Watching for a second session of OI bleeding past -5% on the day or a price break below the $265 entry zone, either of which marks a structure crack.

thesis: SEI prints +10.7% 24h on a top-cap tape running 2/20 green, vol/mcap at 0.29 on $469M cap — idiosyncratic strength on a risk-off session, not market beta.
Q2 catalyst stack lands on fixed dates: Giga upgrade targets 200K+ TPS and sub-400ms finality in H1 2026, EVM migration ships June 15, three weeks out.
Xiaomi preinstalled the Sei Wallet on devices sold outside China and the US, with stablecoin payments rolling across 20K+ retail stores in Q2 — distribution at consumer scale.
SEI absent from the CoinGecko trending list while printing the move. The pattern structurally reads as a bid building under price, not retail chasing the rotation.
risks: Giga is a promised upgrade, not shipped. A slip announcement before H1 close unwinds the catalyst bid fast.
L1 sector sits quiet today with SUI, APT, MOVE all flat-to-red on the 7d. No sector tailwind to ride if SEI catalysts disappoint.
Price sits 94% below the March 2024 ATH at $1.14. Overhead supply is heavy, and rallies above $0.10 hit sellers from prior holders.

watchlist.trigger: funding pushes past +0.08%/8h with pct_24h going flat-to-red, OR pct_24h reverses past -5% with open interest flipping negative
thesis: PLAY ran +60.95% 24h on +1.15% 7d two sessions back. The entire move happened in 24 hours, with funding repricing +0.0973pp over the 7d average to +0.0730%/8h.
Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.43 sits down 0.51 over 7 days. Smart money cut conviction through the rip while open interest doubled to +47.58% 24h on +85% 7d.
Absent from today's perps universe and token-movers. The leveraged-pump consolidation extends without a directional flush, but the funding-extreme setup stays loaded.

evaluations.note: Day 5/7. BCH absent from today's 25-asset perps slice and from token-movers winners/losers/trending for the fifth straight session — price estimated near $340 from a risk-off tape with BTC -1.55% and breadth 6/20 green. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact, no fresh catalyst defends the bid. Invalidation $370 well above. RIDE.

Day 4/7. EIGEN absent from today's perps slice and from token-movers — price estimated near $0.227 from the AI-compute sector cooling that hit NEAR (-11.63%) hardest while RENDER (-1.60%) and TAO (-2.75%) bled only modestly. The named sector-concentration risk fired partially, not wholesale. Narrative-tracker holds AI agents and Decentralized compute Peak RIDE with velocity upgrade — TAO past $305 to a new 2026 high cross-confirms even as today's tape consolidates. Invalidation $0.205 holds. RIDE.

Day 3/7. AKT absent from today's perps slice, winners, losers, and trending — price estimated near $0.88 from the AI-compute sector cooling. NEAR took the sector hit at -11.63% while AKT held — the named sector risk activated through NEAR specifically rather than across the full pack. Decentralized compute holds Peak 5/5 RIDE with the new DePAI wrapper framing extending the catalyst stack. Invalidation $0.78 holds. RIDE.

Day 1/7. Today's perps print at $1.905 closes well below the $2.00 invalidation — breach recorded. The AI-compute sector rotation that the original thesis named as risk #3 (sector concentration) caught the late entry on the wrong side of the unwind. Return -16.81%, -18.01pp vs BTC, -18.52pp vs ETH. LOSS.

Day 2/7. TAO at $272.06 down -2.75% 24h, -2.24% from fire. The ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT sub-tag held one calendar day before regime cooled to NEUTRAL on OI 7d dropping below the +10% gate. Three pillars hold: Bittensor revenue backbone, narrative-tracker Peak RIDE with velocity upgrade, smart money L/S 2.12 still building (+0.10 7d). One pillar broken (regime), three intact. Invalidation $255 well clear. RIDE.

close.close_reason: daily close $1.905 crossed the $2.00 invalidation on day 1; AI-compute sector rotation that the original thesis named as risk #3 (sector concentration) caught the late entry on the wrong side of the unwind

engine_watch_conditions.trigger_label: invalidation breached — recent breakout level lost
funding heating — longs paying premium for continuation
open interest building meaningfully — fresh leverage entering
